title: correct go-binding key for volumes
body:
the go binding for remove container was using 'vols' for a key to remove volumes associated to the container.  the correct key should be "v" and is documented as such.

Fixes: #7128

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Sorry to ruin your 1-liner, but would you mind removing https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/d4cf3c589d09dd395a3b63e82f5a5c198535cb46/test/system/160-volumes.bats#L145
